text: Loved this bathroom! Seems pretty regularly maintained. A bit of gunk in the sink though. Good place to study!
It's okay, but the single stall can feel cramped. Not accessible, which is a problem.
Clean and spacious. Always stocked with toilet paper. Highly recommend!
Outdated fixtures, but it works. Could use some updating.
Showers are a lifesaver after practice. Keep it up!
Quiet and private. Perfect for a quick break.
Public restroom, so it's what you expect. Clean enough.
Beautiful view from the window! Worth the wait.
Late-night study essential. Showers help wake you up.
Basic outdoor facilities. Not the best, but necessary for hikes.
